title: 2023 USAMO Problems
problem: In an acute triangle $ABC$ , let $M$ be the midpoint of $\overline{BC}$ . Let $P$ be the foot of the perpendicular from $C$ to $AM$ . Suppose the circumcircle of triangle $ABP$ intersects line $BC$ at two distinct points $B$ and $Q$ . Let $N$ be the midpoint of $\overline{AQ}$ . Prove that $NB=NC$ . Solution
